# uptimekuma_notification_notifery (Resource)

Notifery notification resource

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "uptimekuma_notification_notifery" "example" {
  name       = "Notifery Notifications"
  api_key    = "your-notifery-api-key"
  title      = "Uptime Kuma Alert"
  is_active  = true
  is_default = false
}

resource "uptimekuma_notification_notifery" "with_group" {
  name       = "Notifery with Group"
  api_key    = "your-notifery-api-key"
  title      = "Uptime Kuma Alert"
  group      = "infrastructure"
  is_active  = true
  is_default = false
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `api_key` (String, Sensitive) API key for authentication with Notifery service
- `name` (String) Notification name

### Optional

- `apply_existing` (Boolean)
- `group` (String) Notification group for organizing notifications
- `is_active` (Boolean)
- `is_default` (Boolean)
- `title` (String) Title of the notification

### Read-Only

- `id` (Number) Notification identifier
